scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points from gold standard: collect_app_status/collect_unit_status, add_status(), priority order, leader-only app status, multiple handlers pattern, forbidden statuses. Slightly misstates priority order (omits 'error' at top, which the gold standard includes), but otherwise accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: The priority order listed omits 'error' at the top (gold standard: error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active). The response shows 'blocked > maintenance > waiting > active'. This is a minor factual inaccuracy rather than a fabricated API.
